content.explanation:
**Would Have — Conditional Perfect (Imaginary Past):**

"Would have" = होता / करता / मिलता (imaginary past — what WOULD have happened IF something had been different)

**Structure:**
**If** + Subject + **had** + V3 → Subject + **would have** + V3

🇮🇳 अगर मैंने पढ़ाई की होती, तो मैं pass हो जाता।
🇬🇧 If I **had studied**, I **would have passed**.

🇮🇳 अगर तुम जल्दी आते, तो हम मिल सकते थे।
🇬🇧 If you **had come** early, we **would have met**.

**Without "if" (standalone):**
🇮🇳 मैं तुम्हारी मदद करता।
🇬🇧 I **would have helped** you. (implied: if you had asked)

**Negative:**
Subject + **wouldn't have** + V3
🇮🇳 मैं यह कभी नहीं करता।
🇬🇧 I **wouldn't have done** this.
rules: Would have + V3 = 3rd conditional — imaginary past (opposite of what happened)
Full structure: If + had + V3 → would have + V3
If clause (had + V3) can come first or last
Standalone 'would have' implies an understood condition
All subjects same: I/he/she/we/they + would have + V3
content.memoryTrick: **Would Have = Time Machine 🕰️** — 'Would have' एक time machine की तरह है — हम imaginary past में जाकर सोचते हैं 'अगर ऐसा होता तो...' Reality different थी, हम IMAGINE कर रहे हैं।

examples.hindi: अगर वह समय पर आता, तो वे interview नहीं miss करते।
examples.english: If he had come on time, he would not have missed the interview.

examples.hindi: अगर मैंने उससे पहले बात की होती, तो गलतफहमी नहीं होती।
examples.english: If I had talked to him earlier, there would not have been a misunderstanding.

examples.hindi: अगर हम map देखते, तो रास्ता नहीं भूलते।
examples.english: If we had checked the map, we would not have gotten lost.

examples.hindi: मैं तुम्हारी party में ज़रूर आता।
examples.english: I would have definitely come to your party.

examples.hindi: अगर उसने invest किया होता, तो आज वह अमीर होता।
examples.english: If he had invested, he would have been rich today.

examples.hindi: मैं यह नौकरी कभी नहीं छोड़ता।
examples.english: I would never have left this job.

mistakes.wrong: If I would have studied, I would have passed.
mistakes.correct: If I had studied, I would have passed.

mistakes.why: V3 of go = gone, not went

mistakes.wrong: If she had gone, she will have met him.
mistakes.correct: If she had gone, she would have met him.

mistakes.wrong: We wouldn't have not done it.
mistakes.why: Only ONE negative — not double negative

speakingTips: Life reflection: 'If I had started earlier, I would have reached my goal by now.'
Business analysis: 'If we had planned better, we would have avoided this loss.'
Personal growth: 'I would have handled that situation differently today.'

vocabulary.example: This is a hypothetical situation — what would have happened?
The consequence would have been different.
This is an imaginary past scenario.
The outcome would have been better.
In that scenario, I would have helped.
A different decision would have changed everything.
The impact would have been huge.

practice.hindi: अगर मैंने पढ़ाई की होती, तो pass हो जाता।
practice.english: If I had studied, I would have passed.
alternatives: i would have passed if i had studied.
practice.hint: If + had studied → would have + passed

practice.hindi: अगर तुम जल्दी आते, तो हम मिल लेते।
practice.english: If you had come early, we would have met.
alternatives: we would have met if you had arrived early.
practice.hint: If + had come → would have + met

practice.hindi: मैं तुम्हारी ज़रूर मदद करता।
practice.english: I would have definitely helped you.
alternatives: i would have surely assisted you.
practice.hint: would have + helped + definitely

practice.hindi: अगर उसने invest किया होता, तो आज अमीर होता।
practice.english: If he had invested, he would have been rich today.
alternatives: he would be rich today if he had invested.
practice.hint: If + had invested → would have + been rich

practice.hindi: मैं यह नौकरी कभी नहीं छोड़ता।
practice.english: I would never have left this job.
alternatives: i would not have quit this job.
practice.hint: would never have + left

practice.hindi: अगर उसने ध्यान दिया होता, तो गलती नहीं होती।
practice.english: If he had paid attention, he would not have made a mistake.
alternatives: he would not have erred if he had been careful.
practice.hint: If + had paid → would not have + made

practice.hindi: तुम्हारी जगह मैं वह job ज़रूर लेता।
practice.english: In your place, I would have definitely taken that job.
alternatives: i would have accepted that job if i were you.
practice.hint: would have + taken + in your place

practice.hindi: अगर हम earlier plan करते, तो better result होता।
practice.english: If we had planned earlier, we would have gotten better results.
alternatives: better results would have come if we had planned ahead.
practice.hint: If + had planned → would have + gotten

practice.hindi: वह competition ज़रूर जीतती अगर nervous नहीं होती।
practice.english: She would have won the competition if she had not been nervous.
alternatives: she could have won if she had not been anxious.
practice.hint: would have + won + if not nervous

practice.hindi: मैं उससे माफ़ी माँगता अगर मुझे पता होता।
practice.english: I would have apologized to him if I had known.
alternatives: i would have said sorry if i had known.
practice.hint: would have + apologized + if had known

practice.hindi: अगर वे समय पर पहुँचते, तो presentation नहीं छूटती।
practice.english: If they had arrived on time, they would not have missed the presentation.
alternatives: they would have caught the presentation if they had been on time.
practice.hint: If + had arrived → would not have + missed

practice.hindi: मैं यह गलती कभी नहीं करता।
practice.english: I would never have made this mistake.
alternatives: i would not have committed this error.
practice.hint: would never have + made

practice.hindi: अगर weather अच्छा होता, तो हम picnic जाते।
practice.english: If the weather had been good, we would have gone for a picnic.
alternatives: we would have had a picnic if the weather had been nicer.
practice.hint: If + had been → would have + gone

practice.hindi: अगर वह apply करता, तो ज़रूर select होता।
practice.english: If he had applied, he would have definitely been selected.
alternatives: he would surely have been chosen if he had applied.
practice.hint: If + had applied → would have + been selected

practice.hindi: उसकी मदद के बिना मैं यह नहीं कर सकता था।
practice.english: Without her help, I would not have been able to do this.
alternatives: i could not have managed without her help.
practice.hint: would not have + been able to

practice.hindi: अगर मैंने उसकी बात सुनी होती, तो आज खुश होता।
practice.english: If I had listened to him, I would have been happy today.
alternatives: i would be happy now if i had heeded his advice.
practice.hint: If + had listened → would have + been happy

practice.hindi: हम ज़रूर agree करते उसकी proposal पर।
practice.english: We would have definitely agreed to his proposal.
alternatives: we would surely have accepted his proposal.
practice.hint: would have + agreed + definitely

practice.hindi: अगर sale better होती, तो bonus मिलता।
practice.english: If the sales had been better, we would have gotten a bonus.
alternatives: we would have received a bonus with better sales.
practice.hint: If + had been → would have + gotten bonus

practice.hindi: मैं वह chance कभी नहीं छोड़ता।
practice.english: I would never have missed that chance.
alternatives: i would not have let that opportunity slip away.
practice.hint: would never have + missed

practice.hindi: अगर वह system crash नहीं होता, तो data save होता।
practice.english: If the system had not crashed, the data would have been saved.
alternatives: the data would be intact if the system had not failed.
practice.hint: If + had not crashed → would have + been saved

practice.hindi: तुम्हारी जगह मैं directly HR से बात करता।
practice.english: In your place, I would have spoken to HR directly.
alternatives: i would have contacted HR myself if i were you.
practice.hint: would have + spoken + in your place

practice.hindi: अगर project on time deliver होता, तो client खुश होता।
practice.english: If the project had been delivered on time, the client would have been happy.
alternatives: the client would have been pleased with on-time delivery.
practice.hint: If + had been delivered → would have + been happy

practice.hindi: मैं तुम्हें पहले ही बता देता।
practice.english: I would have told you earlier.
alternatives: i would have informed you sooner.
practice.hint: would have + told + earlier

practice.hindi: अगर उसने extra effort लगाया होता, तो promotion मिलता।
practice.english: If he had put in extra effort, he would have gotten the promotion.
alternatives: he would have been promoted with more effort.
practice.hint: If + had put in → would have + gotten

practice.hindi: हम उस समय much better decision लेते।
practice.english: We would have made a much better decision at that time.
alternatives: a far better choice would have been made back then.
practice.hint: would have + made a better decision

practice.hindi: वह तुम्हारे साथ ज़रूर आती।
practice.english: She would have definitely come with you.
alternatives: she would surely have joined you.
practice.hint: would have + come + definitely

practice.hindi: अगर connection अच्छा होता, तो call better होती।
practice.english: If the connection had been good, the call would have been better.
alternatives: the call quality would have been better with a stronger connection.
practice.hint: If + had been → would have + been better

practice.hindi: मैं उसे personally thank करता।
practice.english: I would have thanked him personally.
alternatives: i would have expressed my gratitude in person.
practice.hint: would have + thanked + personally

practice.hindi: अगर हम earlier plan करते, तो stress कम होता।
practice.english: If we had planned earlier, there would have been less stress.
alternatives: earlier planning would have reduced the stress.
practice.hint: If + had planned → would have been less stress

practice.hindi: तुम्हारी जगह मैं वह property ज़रूर खरीदता।
practice.english: In your place, I would have definitely bought that property.
alternatives: i would have purchased that property if i were you.
practice.hint: would have + bought + definitely
